ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "primary_physician" TEXT /* Name of the primary physician */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the medical condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the medical condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical condition diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who made the diagnosis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the diagnosis was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES medical_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being tested */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the test */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific test */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lab result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lab result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being treated */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical condition */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date of onset of the condition */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date of resolution of the condition (if applicable) */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who recorded the history */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the medical history */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medical history entry was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the medical history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES medical_conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictive model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model used */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being predicted */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who made the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
